title: Pilots’ Association Warns of Fatigue, Urges DGCA to Fast‑Track FDTL Rollout
description: The Airline Pilots’ Association of India (ALPA) has urged the Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA) to urgently implement the Court-mandated Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL) framework. The pilots’ body flagged serious concerns over fatigue, flight safety, and regulatory credibility, citing recent pilot deaths and the continued deferment of FDTL rules.
